title: EDINET Replay — Faithful Filing
description: OIM-compatible resolved facts for one EDINET filing, plus the provenance needed to return to the original XBRL/iXBRL: original context/unit tables, iXBRL lexical/presentation layers, and per-fact EDINET package source references. Facts carry resolved aspects (the meaning); source_context_ref/source_unit_ref plus the contexts/units tables carry the original references (the origin). Numeric values are strings to preserve large integers, precision, and exponents. Output is intended to be serialized under the canonicalization profile 'faithful-filing-jcs-v1' so the document itself is hashable (golden-by-hash).

filing.description: Identifies the filing. Pair with the extraction manifest for full reproduction identity.

canonicalization.description: Canonicalization profiles this document commits to. json_profile governs how the whole document is serialized for hashing; xml_c14n governs typed_dimensions.canonical_xml_sha256.

json_profile.description: UTF-8; no Unicode normalization; JSON keys sorted by Unicode code point; no insignificant whitespace; no trailing newline; numbers carried as strings; maps ordered by id; arrays in the order defined by this schema. RFC 8785 JCS-aligned. See docs/canonicalization-v1.md.

xml_c14n.description: XML Canonicalization method applied before hashing typed-dimension XML, so namespace-prefix differences do not change the hash.

facts.description: Map of fact id -> fact. The key IS the fact id (OIM style).

contexts.description: Provenance table of ORIGINAL xbrli:context elements, keyed by original context id (referenced by fact.source_context_ref). Facts also carry the resolved projection in fact.dimensions; this table preserves the original structure.

units.description: Provenance table of ORIGINAL xbrli:unit elements, keyed by original unit id (referenced by fact.source_unit_ref).

footnotes.description: Map of footnote id -> footnote resource. Relationships to facts are kept separately in fact_footnote_relationships (XBRL keeps footnotes as related resources, not embedded).

fact_footnote_relationships.description: fact -> footnote relationships, ordered by (fact_id, footnote_id, arcrole).

qname.description: Prefixed QName, e.g. jpcrp_cor:Assets or iso4217:JPY.

xbrl_date.description: xs:date or xs:dateTime lexical form, preserved as-is.

source_ref.description: Pointer back into the EDINET package. package_path is always present; element_id/line/column/xpath depend on the parser and are optional.

package_path.description: Path within the submission ZIP, e.g. XBRL/PublicDoc/example_ixbrl.htm.

segment_xml.description: Raw xbrli:segment XML as-is, or null if absent.

scenario_xml.description: Raw xbrli:scenario XML as-is, or null if absent.

xml.description: Raw typed-dimension member XML, preserved verbatim.

canonical_xml_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the member XML after applying canonicalization.xml_c14n, so prefix differences do not change the value.

fact.description: One resolved fact. value is the Arelle-resolved value as a string (null when nil). Optional numeric/text provenance layers reconstruct the original lexical and presented forms.

value.description: Arelle-resolved value, as a string to avoid JSON number precision loss. null iff nil is true.

nil.description: True iff the original element carried xsi:nil='true'. Distinguishes an absent value from an empty string: {nil:true,value:null} != {nil:false,value:''}.

decimals.description: Original @decimals verbatim, as a string. Allows 'INF'. Not computed.

precision.description: Original @precision verbatim, as a string. Allows 'INF'. Not computed.

lexical_value.description: Numeric provenance: the lexical value of the XBRL/iXBRL element before transform (e.g. '123' for a scaled fact).

display_text.description: Numeric provenance: the string as presented in the iXBRL document.

ixbrl_transform.description: iXBRL numeric transform attributes, when the fact came from Inline XBRL.

text_value.description: Text/textBlock provenance. resolved is the Arelle fact value; lexical and display_html are optional origin layers. Preserve escaped XHTML as-is; do not unescape or reflow.

explicit_dimensions.description: Map of dimension QName -> member QName.

typed_dimensions.description: Map of dimension QName -> typed member (raw XML + canonical hash).

source_unit_ref.description: Original unit id (key into units); present for numeric facts.
